name: @cteno/multi-agent-runtime
description: Unified multi-agent protocol runtime with Claude Agent SDK and Codex SDK adapters.

scripts.e2e:coding: npm run build && MULTI_AGENT_E2E_TEMPLATE=coding-studio MULTI_AGENT_E2E_PROVIDER=claude node --test ./tests/e2e/template-suite.test.mjs
scripts.e2e:codex:coding: npm run build && MULTI_AGENT_E2E_TEMPLATE=coding-studio MULTI_AGENT_E2E_PROVIDER=codex node --test ./tests/e2e/template-suite.test.mjs
scripts.e2e:codex:opc: npm run build && MULTI_AGENT_E2E_TEMPLATE=opc-solo-company MULTI_AGENT_E2E_PROVIDER=codex node --test ./tests/e2e/template-suite.test.mjs
scripts.e2e:codex:autoresearch: npm run build && MULTI_AGENT_E2E_TEMPLATE=autoresearch MULTI_AGENT_E2E_PROVIDER=codex node --test ./tests/e2e/template-suite.test.mjs
scripts.e2e:opc: npm run build && MULTI_AGENT_E2E_TEMPLATE=opc-solo-company MULTI_AGENT_E2E_PROVIDER=claude node --test ./tests/e2e/template-suite.test.mjs
scripts.e2e:autoresearch: npm run build && MULTI_AGENT_E2E_TEMPLATE=autoresearch MULTI_AGENT_E2E_PROVIDER=claude node --test ./tests/e2e/template-suite.test.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run typecheck
